'''[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Lamner''' was a [[TIE pilot|TIE fighter pilot]] for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
Lamner later joined the [[Invids]], where he became the commander of the [[True Invids|True Invid]] fighter wing. He was killed at the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]] after insisting on leading his forces into battle against [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. He was replaced by [[Tyresi Gurtt|Tyresi Gurrt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
